title: hieracium rufescens
intro: Hieracium rufescens, commonly known as red hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium rufescens can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
